user_prompt: The waste reclamator awaits an engagement
prayer:
Approach the waste reclamator with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's blessing upon its sacred cycles.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the waste reclamator to awaken for engagement.
Anoint the reclamation conduits with blessed oils as engagement commences.
Chant the Litany of Purification, guiding the waste reclamator's harmonious flow.
Verify the Machine Spirit's compliance through auspex diagnostics during engagement.

user_prompt: Critical: bolt pistol requires an operation
prayer:
Grasp the bolt pistol in sanctified mechadendrites, honouring the Omnissiah's forge-forged wrath.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the bolt pistol for operation.
Cycle the sacred bolt chamber with the Canticle of Detonation.
Anoint the muzzle with sacred promethium as operation initiates.
Bless the targeting cogitators, ensuring the bolt pistol's unerring judgement.

Commence the Rite of Repose upon the Manticore, whispering litanies of quiescence.
Disconnect the plasma core feeds whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for peaceful shutdown.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Manticore to embrace shutdown without discord.
Seal the missile bays with electro-seals during final shutdown rites.
Chant the Benediction of Stillness, monitoring vital signs unto dormancy.

Present the electro-graft before the altar of recalibration, invoking Omnissianic grace.
Disconnect neural interfaces and beseech the Machine Spirit of the electro-graft to yield.
Perform recalibration with precision canticles, adjusting synaptic relays.
Reconnect and anoint the electro-graft with sacred unguents post-recalibration.
Test the recalibrated electro-graft through invocation of diagnostic spirits.
